title: Dil ka purana zakhm abhi tak taaza hai
Bahut khushnooma kal ki Raat guzri hai
Dosti dil me hoti hai.. dikhaweme nahi...
Tujhse mile bina tera haal bata sakta hu
Hum aapki yaad mein udaas hai
Mere dil se poocho is main pyar kitna hai
Is Ishq ne to khuda ko bhi rulaya hoga!!
Dedicate a Shayari to above person
Kya paata who humse muhabbat karti hai
Hum To hain Un phoolon Jaise ..!!
Tujhse jo pyar mila hai, us pyar ki kasam
Kosish nahi karte Dil Lagane ki. ...
Asshaar mairay youn tu ZAMANAY kay liyeah
Aaj tak hum chahte rahe hain aapko
Kabi ro k muskraye kabi muskra k roe
Pyar to pal bhar me ho jata hai,
Koi kuch na keh kar pyaar ko nibhata h
Yaad meri bhi kisi ko ane lagi hai..
Woh baat Zubaan tak aayi Magar..
Tumne hath faila kar wapis bulaya to hota
